case_title: CHIN, GRACE vs. FITZGERALD, IAN et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIN, GRACE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FITZGERALD, IAN PROUDFOOT, KAREN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 920 LEAVENWORTH ST #402, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION MADE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER C.R.C. 522
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FITZGERALD, IAN PROUDFOOT, KAREN
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIN, GRACE SERVED SEP-27-1997, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT FITZGERALD, IAN PROUDFOOT, KAREN
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE TO PAY OR QUIT AND/OR NOTICE TO VACATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIN, GRACE
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT FITZGERALD, IAN PROUDFOOT, KAREN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT FITZGERALD, IAN PROUDFOOT, KAREN
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, DECLARATION GRANTED --2-- JUDGE QUIDACHAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIN, GRACE
